roa.docketEntryComment: DEFENDANT'S MOTION TO MODIFY CONDITIONS OF RELEASE FILED

/CAL POSSIBLE DEJ DISMISSAL/TEXT DEFERRED ENTRY OF JUDGMENT; CRT ORDS DIVTERM AS SUCCESSFUL/X:THE DEFENDANT HAS SUCCESSFULLY COMPLETED ALL TERMS AND CONDITIONS  OF THE DEFERRED ENTRY OF JUDGMENT PROGRAM, THE GUILTY PLEA OF06-16-21  IS HEREBY SET ASIDE AND A NOT GUILTY PLEA ENTERED,/MO PC 1385:INTEREST OF JUSTICE/SATERM/

/CAL PREHEARING CONFERENCE AND STATUS OF YAC, DEFENSE MOTION TO MODIFY REASE/ORNAS/X:THE PEOPLE ORALLY AMEND THE COMPLAINT TO ADD COUNT 004, A VIOLATION OF PENAL CODE SECTION 487(C), A MISDEMEANOR/FAWC/IRRC/TEXT:DEFT ADV& PERS WVS CONST & CITZ RTS ENT PLEA OF NL/DEFT ADV NL:004/NOLO/CO:NEGOTIATED DISPOSITION/CTORD:GPS MONITORING IS TERMINATED UPON RETURN OF ALL EQUIPMENT TO SHERIFF'S DEPARTMENT/X:SENTENCING IS DEFERRED FOR ONE YEAR IN ORDER FOR DEFENDANT TO COMPLETE 50 HOURS OF COMMUNITY SERVICE, ATTEND SCHOOL,LOOK FOR EMPLOYMENT UPON COMPLETION OF SCHOOLING, RECEIVE THERAPY THROUGH BERKELEY MENTAL HEALTH, AND PICK UP NO NEW ARRESTS, IF DEFENDANT SUCCESSFULLY COMPLETES THE AFOREMENTIONEDTERMS, THE PLEA SHALL BE WITHDRAWN AND THE PROPOSED SENTENCE AND CASE IS TOBE DISMISSED/CONTD:STATUS OF DEJ/DOP/CO:NEGOTIATED DISPOSITION/
/CAL:PREHEARING CONFERENCE/X:THE COURT GRANTS THE DEFENSE'S REQUEST TO MODIFY ELECTRONIC MONITORING/CTORD:THE DEFENDANT SHALL HAVE A CURFEW OF 10 PM- 6 AM/CONT/DOP/

/CAL:ARRAIGNMENT/TEXT:DEFT ENT NG PLEA(S) & DEN OF ALLEG/PD/FAWC/DEFTARR1/X:THE DEFENSE RESERVES THE RIGHT TO DEMURRER,/NTW60/LDPX:11-12-19/987,2/ACM/X:AS A CONDITION OF RELEASE, THE DEFENDANT SHALL BE PLACED ON PRE-TRIAL MONITORING BY THE SHERIFF'S DEPARTMENT,/DEF:SHALL BE FITTED WITH A GPS DEVICE,  AND IS ORDERED TO COMPLY WITH ALL TERMS OF RELEASE AS SET FORTH ONTHE RECORD AND BY THE SFSD/CTORD:DEFENDANT SHALL BE RELEASED WITH COORDINATED PICK-UP/X:SEE SIGNED ORDER IN FILE,/SA1:DAVID LEVEDAG/SA2:LARKIN & MCALLISTER STREETS, SAN FRANCISCO/SAORD3/SAORD/CONTD: PREHEARING CONFERENCE/DOP/
/CAL:STATUS OF DEFERRED ENTRY OF JUDGMENT/DAWT/FAVRPT/CONTD:POSSIBLE DEJDISMISSAL/DOPU:POSITIVE REPORT/
/CAL: PHC/STWPX/X: LAST DAY OF 11-12-19 IS SET ASIDE,/CONT/DOP/
